title: SNDL Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL achieved a historic milestone by reporting its first-ever positive operating income in Q2 2025. The company generated net revenue of $244.8 million, representing 7.3% year-over-year growth, with the cannabis segment leading performance through strong expansion. The cannabis business expanded at an accelerated pace, with the combined segment growing 17.4% compared to the prior year period. This outpaced broader market growth significantly. Gross profit reached $67.6 million, up 16.2% year-over-year, while gross margin improved to 27.6%. Management noted that the company delivered positive operating income in the second quarter of 2025, totaling $5.0 million, marking a pivotal turning point in profitability. The liquor retail division also contributed meaningfully, with same-store sales climbing 2.7%. SNDL maintained a robust financial position with $208.2 million in unrestricted cash and zero debt. The company announced plans to acquire 32 cannabis retail stores from 1CM for $32.2 million and launched its Rise Rewards loyalty program to enhance customer engagement.
